title: Solana program IDs (per-network)
description: Canonical program IDs for the protocols Rome integrates with on a given Solana cluster. Required entries are core SPL / system programs that exist identically across networks; everything else is optional and only present when (a) Rome's services or Cardo's adapters use it, and (b) it's deployed on that cluster.

splToken2022.description: SPL Token-2022 (extensions: transfer hooks, confidential transfers, etc.).

memo.description: SPL Memo program — used by Cardo to tag orchestrator txs.

stakePool.description: SPL stake-pool program — covers JitoSOL, bSOL, JupSOL, dSOL, etc. Marinade is separate.

marinade.description: Marinade Liquid Staking — its own program (NOT spl-stake-pool). mSOL deposit/unstake target.

raydiumAmmV4.description: Raydium hand-rolled AMM v4 — devnet redeploy at HWy1jot…, NOT same as mainnet.

raydiumCpmm.description: Raydium constant-product MM — Anchor-based; devnet redeploy at CPMDWBwJ….

raydiumClmm.description: Raydium concentrated-liquidity MM — devnet redeploy at devi51m….

meteoraDammV1.description: Meteora dynamic AMM v1 — production gas-pricing pool family.

pumpSwap.description: PumpSwap — DEX layer over Pump.fun graduations.

kaminoLend.description: Kamino lending (klend) — Main market USDC reserve. Mainnet only today.

kaminoFarms.description: Kamino farms — required for klend deposits with farms enabled.

squadsV4.description: Squads V4 multisig — propose / approve / execute.

jupiterV6.description: Jupiter aggregator router (v6) — used by Cardo orchestrator for swap + stake routing.
